sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the company's business area and include a primary contact CTA.
Verksamhetsoversikt should summarise actual operations such as extraction focus, sites or processing scope without using vague marketing copy.
Trust proof must rely on real facts such as organisation details, references or established operating context and must appear before the final CTA.
Map or gallery may appear between overview and trust proof when they add concrete context.
Sections should avoid repeating the same operational claims.
Verksamhet intro must connect the company identity to what is actually extracted or handled.
Malm-eller-produktionsfokus should be concrete, for example ore types, mine phases or processing steps, and must not promise volumes unless supplied by source data.
Drift-och-process should explain operations in plain language for external visitors.
Contact CTA should invite relevant business contact without overstating capabilities.
Safety and environmental sections must be factual and must not invent certifications, permits or compliance statuses.
If trust proof is shown here, it should complement rather than repeat the same points used on the home page.
Copy should balance responsibility and clarity without making unverifiable claims.
Site or project list items must identify actual places, facilities or project stages when data exists.
Gallery should show real operational environments, equipment or site imagery when available.
Map may be used when location context helps visitors understand where the business operates.
Do not present speculative future projects as completed operations.
Phone, email and address must all be present and must not be placeholders.
Contact form should support straightforward business enquiries.
Map location should match the stated address or visitor location information.
